title: Why Existential Risk Matters
body:
Existential Risk matters because the world is rarely partitioned the way school subjects are. Real systems blend technology, institutions, incentives, culture, and human judgment.

A topic like this helps you see those overlaps sooner. That makes the academy feel more like a map of reality than a set of separate courses.
keyPoints: Important real-world questions spill across subject boundaries
Cross-domain topics improve synthesis and judgment
The goal is memorable framing before optional depth
Signals keep the topic connected to the present tense
furtherReading: Follow the related signals and source packs as they expand
Use the linked subjects to turn curiosity into depth
